overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game featuring a character in western attire exploring a dramatic river canyon. The character walks along a misty cliff overlook before transitioning to a sunlit shoreline approach toward a large waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge overlooking wide river valley

events.description: character begins walking along the narrow cliff ledge overlooking the river
screen fades to black indicating a change in location or time

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along a rocky cliff edge, surveying the misty river valley with a distant waterfall visible to the left

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down distant cliff face partially obscured by atmospheric mist
wide river flowing through steep canyon with layered rock formations
steep canyon walls lining the opposite side of the river
green leafy branches and bamboo partially obscuring the view
narrow dirt and rock path along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky cliff path overlooking a vast misty river valley. A waterfall is visible in the distance to the left, while steep canyon walls rise on the opposite side. The atmosphere is hazy and overcast with natural diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall pool shoreline in rocky canyon

events.description: cut to new location at water level facing a large waterfall in a sunlit canyon
bright sunlight illuminates the canyon and waterfall, shifting from misty overcast to clear

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline toward the base of a large waterfall, wading through shallow water at the pool's edge

entered.detail: large two-tiered waterfall cascading down sheer rock face into the pool below
tall rocky cliff wall with sparse vegetation rising beside the waterfall
steep rock formation framing the right side of the waterfall
calm water at the base of the waterfall reflecting the surrounding cliffs
bushes and grasses growing along the rocky water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a sunlit canyon where the character walks along the shoreline toward a majestic waterfall. The water flows into a calm pool surrounded by steep rock walls. The lighting is bright and direct, contrasting with the previous misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged cliffside that overlooks a vast, atmospheric river valley. It begins with the character traversing a narrow rocky path, where the surrounding environment is shrouded in a hazy, overcast mist. As the camera moves forward, the diffused lighting emphasizes the scale of the steep canyon walls rising sharply on the opposite side. The scene then expands to reveal a distant waterfall cascading down the cliffs to the left, maintaining a moody and muted tone throughout the journey.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit canyon that leads toward a majestic waterfall. It begins with the character walking along a bright shoreline, moving away from the previous misty atmosphere into direct, vivid lighting. As the camera advances, the path opens up to reveal a calm pool of water nestled between steep, towering rock walls. The scene finally culminates in a wide view of the waterfall as the character approaches the water's edge.
